---
name: Tooling
about: Report or propose a change to build, linting, CI, release, or npm packaging.
title: "[Tooling]: "
labels: tooling
---

Please search existing and closed issues before opening a new one.

## Area

- [ ] Build
- [ ] Watch mode
- [ ] Linting or formatting
- [ ] CI
- [ ] Release artifacts
- [ ] npm package
- [ ] Dependency policy

## Current Behavior

What happens today?

## Desired Behavior

What should happen instead?

## Why

Why is this worth changing?

## Verification

Which commands or checks should prove the change works?

```sh
npm run lint
npm run build
```

## Additional Context

Links, logs, prior art, or related issues.
